scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "frontend,backoffice,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backoffice" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backoffice
scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "frontend,backoffice,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run start -w frontend" "npm run start -w backoffice" "npm run start -w backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backoffice
